overall_goal: Finalize the Job-Based Accounting infrastructure, focusing on UI visibility and navigation based on user settings.
key_knowledge: Dynamic Visibility: The 'Jobs' module and 'Job Reports' are now dynamically shown/hidden based on the jobBasedAccountingEnabled flag.
Real-time Sync: All relevant screens (Sidebar, Dashboard, Reports, Jobs) now use streamSettings for immediate UI updates when the toggle is changed.
Restricted Access: Job creation and job-specific filtering in reports are automatically hidden or disabled when the feature is off.
recent_actions: Updated General Ledger, Trial Balance, Balance Sheet, and Profit & Loss screens to hide Job filters when disabled.
Updated Jobs Screen and Job Report Screen to show 'Feature Disabled' fallback UI when disabled.
Converted Reports Dashboard to use a StreamBuilder for real-time visibility of the Job Profitability card.
Verified that transaction screens (Invoices, Bills, Expenses) already respect the job-based accounting toggle.
current_plan: 1. [DONE] Confirm Job-Based Accounting toggle exists in settings.
2. [DONE] Make sidebar navigation reactive to the Job-Based Accounting setting.
3. [DONE] Integrate 'Job Profitability' into the Reports Dashboard (with visibility toggle).
4. [DONE] Ensure 'Add Job' and 'Job Ledger' features are accessible only when enabled.
5. [TODO] Perform end-to-end test of turning the feature ON and observing UI updates.
